hero.headline: AI Systems Expert
hero.subheadline: I help businesses design and implement agentic AI systems, automation infrastructure, and production workflows that reduce manual work and create measurable revenue impact.

about.body: Goal-driven AI Systems Expert building RAG systems, AI agents, and production automation workflows. I focus on shipping measurable systems that reduce manual work, improve decision-making, and turn complex operations into scalable business outcomes.

highlights: Build agentic workflows and automation systems using FastAPI and GCP
Orchestrate Claude Opus and GPT-Codex workflows (12 min → 3 min runtime)
Build AI education systems for kids and women
Create practical learning workflows that make AI tools easier to understand and use
Built multimodal intake automation with Notion, n8n, and OpenAI
Implemented manual-review routing, duplicate protection, and audit logging
Passed acceptance tests for text, DOCX, PDF, Excel, image, and MP4/audio paths
Analyze existing systems to identify operational bottlenecks
Implement targeted AI and automation solutions that directly increase revenue and efficiency
Build agentic systems with Next.js, n8n, APIs, Python, and LLM tools
Built Next.js interfaces and FastAPI/Django backend systems
Delivered service pipelines, CRM workflows, and reporting systems
Full-stack AI implementation with clean client handoff

experience.type: Contract · New York, United States · Remote
highlights: Built agentic content operations across research, publishing, translation, and media generation
Connected Python, LangChain, n8n, FastAPI, Notion, OpenRouter, Claude, GPT, Gemini, and Kling
Automated 14 daily workflows across eight platforms

projects.name: $250K/year content team replacement

projects.metric: 14 daily workflows · 6 languages · 149 translations/run · 0 manual ops

projects.name: Conover Industries multimodal intake automation
projects.description: Production-ready intake automation that converts manual text, documents, spreadsheets, screenshots, and MP4/audio inputs from Notion into structured JSON, linked action items, review routing, duplicate protection, and audit logs.

projects.metric: Multimodal intake · review routing · duplicate protection · audit logs

projects.name: Momentum AI Studio

projects.techStack: Next.js 16 · TypeScript · React 19 · Tailwind CSS · NextAuth · n8n · Reap AI · CleanVoice AI · Google Drive · Google Sheets · Vercel
projects.metric: 5GB uploads · 14 languages · multi-platform posting · 15s processing refresh

projects.name: Multi-agent email attachment processing

projects.name: AI avatar video generation

projects.name: Content repurposing pipeline
projects.description: Turns long-form videos into platform-specific social clips at scale. 100+ videos per month with 22x ROI.

projects.name: Social distribution + lead capture

projects.name: Real Estate AI Video Engine
projects.description: Converts one source video into eight platform-ready assets in approximately three minutes.

now.line1: Making AI systems that should exist but usually get stuck at the prototype stage. Simple is hard, measurable is harder, but both are worth it.
now.line2: If you're deciding between a single-model workflow and a multi-agent system, that's usually where I do my best work.

contact.cta: Let's connect. I'm open to AI Systems Expert roles, contract work, and collaboration on production AI systems.
